programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. programme.desc: On an alpine mountain goat hunt in the Rockies, Steven and guest Kurt Racicot discover that whiteout conditions make their elusive prey tough to spot.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: At a South Texas ranch, Steven and Clay Newcomb host wild-game chef Jesse Griffiths, who turns their white-tailed venison into five flavorful dishes.

programme.title: Adventures of Chapo Gringo
programme.desc: A character-driven outdoor and travel series following Chapo Gringo as he moves through hunting camps, ranches, border towns, and remote places-meeting real people, telling real stories, and keeping things human.

programme.title: Guns & Gear
programme.desc: Explore the Ruger American Gen II in 22 ARC; a new gear from SecureIT, Wheeler Tools, Meprolight and Colt.

programme.title: Guns & Ammo TV
programme.desc: We discuss the ins & outs of buying a suppressor.

programme.desc: Jeb and Amanda head west for a fly-fishing trip in Montana; Jeb gives fans a behind-the-scenes look at his race training.

programme.desc: Pheasant hunting with South Dakota Veterans hunting with Faulkton High School Students raising money for Veterans events.

programme.title: Tecomate Whitetail Nation
programme.desc: Searching North America for giant bucks and revealing the secrets of the Tecomate Management System.

programme.title: Backwoods Life
programme.desc: For over 20 years Michael Lee and Kevin Knighton have been blessed to bring the Backwoods Life hunting show and outdoor television into the homes of loyal viewers each week. The guys work hard to bring their lives, personalities, and experiences to the show while demonstrating what the average person goes through each year trying to fill tags and their freezers.

programme.title: Made for the Outdoors

programme.title: Stars and Stripes Adventures
programme.desc: Stars & Stripes Adventures & Purple Heart Homes through outdoor adventures, we aim to foster healing, camaraderie, and empowerment, while also engaging a network of patriots to make meaningful improvements to the homes of our heroes. programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: Always in touch with the hottest tactics happening for each new season, the In-Fisherman staff captures the historic rise of the paddletail swimbait for walleyes; revealing one of the most fundamentally productive tactics ever developed for largemouth bass; highlighting proven tools of the trade for giant pike.

programme.title: Let's Fish TV
programme.desc: Let's Fish TV is a weekly look at fishing in the Southern U.S. The program features both fresh and saltwater fishing for most southern species, and gives tips on where and how to catch the most popular game fish in the region.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
